validators.notes: Verified project name and mission created local MDE starter artifacts.
Validated Worker routes, OpenSearch query generation, explain contract, metric math, and no-runtime-LLM rule.
Validated project-local MDE JSON and JSONL artifacts remain parseable.
Validated evaluation artifact shape and metric calculations, but does not replace live OpenSearch Cranfield evaluation.
Proved Workers write scope, secret upload, deployment, workers.dev route, and deployed version creation.
Verified public health, search, explain, latest, and versioned endpoints against live OpenSearch results.
Verified the Worker root serves a search interface with indexed-data details and example queries.
Verified metadata endpoints expose Cranfield document counts, qrel counts, searchable fields, topic hints, and example queries.
The browser plugin reported no available browser instances, so visual inspection was limited to served HTML structure and public HTTP contract checks.
Verified the explain API returns a retrievalFlow sequence that matches the public flow diagram.
Verified the deployed root UI contains the flow diagram and public explain endpoints include retrievalFlow for live queries.
Verified the public evaluation endpoint exposes aggregate metrics and representative strong, mixed, and weak examples.
Verified the deployed root UI includes the evaluation section and live search/explain still work after the evaluation addition.
Verified the root page is a phase overview and Phase 1 content is split into focused overview, search, data, explain, and evaluation routes.
Verified deployed home, Phase 1 subpages, /phase-1 aliases, planned phase pages, search API, explain API, and evaluation API against the public Worker.
Verified local Worker HTML includes dataset references on the home page, Cranfield data page, and BEIR planned page, and that /api/cranfield/meta exposes the Cranfield source URL.
Verified deployed pages include Cranfield, BEIR, ESCI, and behavior-source status references, while live search still returns the expected top Cranfield result.
Verified .mde/traceability.json, timeline docs, canonical IDs, and endpoint manifest contain the Phase 1 chain M-0001, A-0002, SE-0001, ARCH-0.1, ADL-0001, and v0.1.0.
Verified local /api/v0.1/search aliases route to the Cranfield baseline and API payloads include traceability identifiers.
